productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Pink Night suits
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsCoral pink sleeveless pyjama top has a round neck with a short ruffled hem, vents at the hem and graphic print on chestMatching full-length pyjama bottoms in white and pink poodle print, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMatching shorts in coral pink with poodle print hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
